title: Lab: Style a Heat-Response Readiness Checklist
summary: Lab: Style a Heat-Response Readiness Checklist retrieves prior skills in an original keyboard-visible neighborhood readiness task list scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css display flow, css list styling, css link states in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real keyboard-visible neighborhood readiness task list artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Keyboard-visible neighborhood readiness task list case 5: hover is sufficient feedback because every device can emulate it.
